changelog:
📢 1.0.0-beta5: Added new features.

[🟢=New Feature, 🟠=Feature Update, 🟣=Fix]

Here are some improvements from the last version of Deskplay:

🟢 Added: Added anti-aliasing settings option.
🟢 Added: Added window and monitor resolution to gameplay virtual display options. Default: the window option resizes the gameplay virtual in real time. Previous default option: monitor resolution.

I hope you enjoy Deskplay. Keep gaming.
